title: qPCR assay for detecting Triturus cristatus

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2hgaq","text":"Laboratory work space and equipment were sterilized by UV-light and DNase solution and 70% ethanol. Filter pipet tips were used in all steps of the laboratory work.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6pcgo","text":" Negative controls of DNase/RNase free water were used in each qPCR assay. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"22pdb","text":"Handling high concentration of positive controls was performed in a post-PCR room which is physically separated from the pre-PCR room to avoid contamination. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bbiri","text":"Always add your samples first and seal them before adding the serial dilutions of positive control (standard) at the end.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: DNA extraction was performed using Qiagen DNeasy power water sterivex kit. The quality of the extracted DNA was estimated using Nanodrop. Qiagen DNeasy power water sterivex kit: https://www.qiagen.com/se/resources/resourcedetail?id=c5fe7d5f-070a-4ebe-ac04-4bbf05a13e91&lang=en

Internal control When performing DNA extraction, it is often advantageous to have an exogenous source of DNA template that is spiked into the lysis buffer. This control DNA is then co-purified with the sample DNA and can be detected as a positive control for the extraction process. http://www.primerdesign.co.uk/assets/files/internal_control_handbook_dna.pdf?timestamp=1469446474
Primers A B C D 1 Primer/probe Sequence Fragment Gene 2 TCCBL (fwd) CGTAAACTACGGCTGACTAGTACGAA 81 cyt-b 3 TCCBR (rev) CCGATGTGTATGTAGATGCAAACA 4 TCCB.probe CATCCACGCTAACGGAGCCTCGC

PCR mixture A B C D 1 Stock solution Working solution Final concetration (μl) 2 TaqMan Environmental Mastermix 2 2X 1X 10 3 Forward primer 10 μM 0.4 μM 0.8 4 Reverse primer 10 μM 0.4 μM 0.8 5 TaqMan probe 2.5 μM 0.1 μM 0.2 6 Internal control (IC) primer/probe mix 1 7 IC-DNA 0.5 8 Water 3.7 9 Template 3 10 Total 20 3 µl of RNase/DNase free water was used for negative controls
Amplification conditions A B C D 1 Step Time Temp (℃) 2 Preheat 5 min 50 3 Enzyme activation 10 min 95 4 50 cycles Denaturation 30 s 95 5 Extention and Data collection 1 min 60
Standard dilution DNA of Triturus cristatus was serially diluted from 1e 2 -1e -4 for qPCR experiment. Triturus vulagaris was also tested as related species.
qPCR was performed in BioRad qPCR machine CFX96. https://www.bio-rad.com/en-se/product/cfx-maestro-software-for-cfx-real-time-pcr-instruments?ID=OKZP7E15

Internal PCR control. The Cq value obtained with the internal control will vary significantly depending on the extraction efficiency, the quantity of DNA added to the PCR reaction, and the individual machine settings. Cq values of 27±3 are within the normal range.
creator: Omneya Osman
